prompt: A gritty flash photo shot from directly overhead of a young woman lying on a rumpled white bed, surrounded by scattered U.S. dollar bills. Her long dark black hair is spread out dramatically in all directions like a halo across the sheets. She wears a black cropped tank top or sports bra and low-rise black pants with a visible white waistband, exposing her toned midriff. Her left arm reaches straight up toward the camera with an open hand in strong foreshortened perspective, creating a dynamic in-your-face fashion editorial look. A single blurred banknote flies across the lower foreground near the lens, adding motion and depth. She wears layered silver jewelry: 2 pearl-and-silver necklaces, multiple chunky silver bangles on one wrist, and rings on her fingers. The scene includes approximately 40 scattered U.S. bills, mostly $100 notes with a few lower denominations mixed in. Use harsh direct on-camera flash, high contrast, slight wide-angle distortion, candid luxury streetwear energy, early-2000s paparazzi aesthetic, centered composition, full body cropped from mid-thigh upward, white bedding filling the background, realistic photography.
